ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Continued To Oct-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: pauline sloan for Cozetta Bruce and Floyd Murphy (Co-Executors).

Ms. Sloan stated that the delay in closing the estate was due to the ancillary probate in Arkansas. Furthermore, she reported that the property had been on the market for more than a year, that they got a late appraisal, that a Relative was purchasing the property, that they had not completed the sale and that waivers had been presented. The matter was continued to October 13, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
